title: Info HUD
description: A simple hud that display useful parameters and values in-game
body:
## **Info HUD**

Info HUD is a _lightweight_, adjustable in-game overlay for Minecraft that gives you vital world information at a glance, just like Bedrock Edition’s coordinate display, but with extra features and easy toggling!

![Position and Biome toggled on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fe80845021a9d71277974fecd1d0a0f5195e70d.png)

**Features:**

- Shows your current position (XYZ coordinates)
- Displays the direction you’re facing
- Shows your current biome
- Displays the current in-game day

You can freely toggle any part of the HUD on or off without leaving the game, so you always see only the information you want.

**How to use:**

Info HUD is ready to go as soon as you enter a world!

> Press K – Toggle coordinates

> Press V – Toggle facing direction

> Press B – Toggle biome name

> Press N – Toggle in-game day counter

> Press O – Toggle FPS display
  
Each element can be shown or hidden at any time by pressing its key again. The overlay is _discreet_ and adapts to your screen, so it never gets in the way.

**Why Info HUD?**

No complicated setup or menus, just load the mod and play.
Clean, _minimal_ design that fits Minecraft’s vanilla look.
Great for survival, creative building, exploration, and modded playthroughs.
Make your Minecraft experience smarter and more convenient with Info HUD!
